archetype: Organic & Earthy (Customized for Medical / Eye Clinic)
design_philosophy: Calm, professional, and accessible medical dashboard designed natively for RTL (Arabic). Focus on cognitive load reduction with clear data entry grids for eye examinations.

font_family.heading: Cairo, Tajawal, or Almarai (Sans-serif Arabic fonts)

typography.notes: Ensure text-start, text-end, ms-, me-, ps-, pe- are used instead of left/right specific classes to support RTL natively. Line-height should be relaxed (1.6) for Arabic legibility.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards. Gap-6 for grid layouts.
layout_and_spacing.rtl_guidelines: Set dir='rtl' on the root HTML. Use Tailwind logical properties: ms- (margin-start), me- (margin-end), ps- (padding-start), pe- (padding-end), rounded-s-md, rounded-e-md.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0B6E4F] hover:bg-[#074C36] text-white rounded-md px-6 py-2 transition-colors duration-200 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-[#5B3A7D] hover:bg-[#3E2656] text-white rounded-md px-6 py-2 transition-colors duration-200 font-medium
buttons.shortcut: bg-[#F1F5F9] hover:bg-[#E2E8F0] text-[#0F172A] border border-[#CBD5E1] rounded-full px-4 py-1 text-sm transition-colors duration-200

cards.default: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-slate-200 p-6

inputs.default: w-full border border-slate-300 rounded-md px-4 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2A9D8F] focus:border-[#2A9D8F] outline-none transition-all text-start bg-white

table.input_cell: w-full text-center border-0 bg-transparent focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2A9D8F] outline-none py-1

secretary.layout: Centered form layout or split screen.
features: Patient Entry Form: Name, Age, Date (auto-filled).
Submit button to push data to waiting list.

doctor.layout: Sidebar/List on the right (RTL), Main content on the left.
features: Waiting List: List of patients sent by secretary.
Patient Details: Header showing Name, Age, Date.
Eye Exam Table: R/L rows, Columns (VA, SPH, CYL, AX, BCVA, NEAR).
Shortcut Buttons: Quick insert phrases into Notes/Prescription.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Set dir='rtl' in the index.html or root layout.
Use Tailwind logical properties (ms-, me-, ps-, pe-, text-start, text-end) for margin, padding, and text alignment to naturally support RTL.
Ensure 'Cairo', 'Tajawal', or 'Almarai' fonts are imported from Google Fonts in index.html.
Implement the Secretary and Doctor views as separate routes (e.g., /secretary, /doctor).
Mock the backend state using a React Context or simple state lifted to a parent component (or local storage) to pass patients from Secretary to Doctor.
For the eye exam table, strictly use the purple background (#5B3A7D) for the header row and row labels (R, L), with white inputs.
Implement the shortcut buttons feature: when clicked, they should append their text to the currently focused or specific textarea (e.g., Prescription).
Add data-testid attributes to all form inputs, buttons, and table cells.
